mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_inbox WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE message_inbox SET status = #{status},
read_time = #{readTime},
update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE message_id IN
#{messageId}
AND (receiver_id = #{userId} OR sender_id = #{userId}) AND deleted = 0
